script.value:
/**
 * @param {unknown[]} inputs
 * @returns {boolean} to break out current process
 * @returns {{type: EntryType; value: unknown}[]}
 *
 * @example
 * const x = inputs[0];
 * const y = inputs[1];
 * return [{type: "number", value: x + y}];
 */
const options = [
  'item:damage:type:acid',
  'item:damage:type:bleed',  
  'item:damage:type:bludgeoning',  
  'item:damage:type:cold',  
  'item:damage:type:electricity',  
  'item:damage:type:fire',  
  'item:damage:type:force',  
  'item:damage:type:mental',  
  'item:damage:type:piercing',  
  'item:damage:type:poison',  
  'item:damage:type:slashing',  
  'item:damage:type:sonic',  
  'item:damage:type:spirit',  
  'item:damage:type:untyped',  
  'item:damage:type:vitality',  
  'item:damage:type:void',
]
const rollOptions = inputs[0];
const type = rollOptions.find(r => options.includes(r))

const dmgType = {'item:damage:type:acid': 'acid',
  'item:damage:type:bleed': 'bleed',  
  'item:damage:type:bludgeoning': 'bludgeoning',  
  'item:damage:type:cold': 'cold',  
  'item:damage:type:electricity': 'electricity',  
  'item:damage:type:fire': 'fire',  
  'item:damage:type:force': 'force',  
  'item:damage:type:mental': 'mental',  
  'item:damage:type:piercing': 'piercing',  
  'item:damage:type:poison': 'poison',  
  'item:damage:type:slashing': 'slashing',  
  'item:damage:type:sonic': 'sonic',  
  'item:damage:type:spirit': 'spirit',  
  'item:damage:type:untyped': 'untyped',  
  'item:damage:type:vitality': 'vitality',  
  'item:damage:type:void': 'void',
}

return [{type: "text", value: dmgType[type]}];

/**
 * @param {unknown[]} inputs
 * @returns {boolean} to break out current process
 * @returns {{type: EntryType; value: unknown}[]}
 *
 * @example
 * const x = inputs[0];
 * const y = inputs[1];
 * return [{type: "number", value: x + y}];
 */
const patreon = inputs[0]
const type = inputs[1];
const files = {
  'acid': patreon ? "jb2a.liquid.splash.green" : 'jb2a.liquid.splash.blue',
  'bleed': patreon ? "jb2a.liquid.splash.red" : 'jb2a.liquid.splash.blue',  
  'bludgeoning': "jb2a.impact.ground_crack.orange.01",  
  'cold': "jb2a.impact_themed.ice_shard.blue",  
  'electricity': "jb2a.impact.012.blue",  
  'fire': "jb2a.shield_themed.below.fire.01.orange",  
  'force': "jb2a.cast_shape.circle.single01.blue",  
  'mental': "jb2a.template_circle.out_pulse.02.burst.bluewhite",  
  'piercing': patreon ? "jb2a.spike_trap.10x10ft.top.no_base.normal.01" : "jb2a.spike_trap.10x10ft.top.holes.normal.01.01",  
  'poison': patreon ? "jb2a.sleep.cloud.02.green" : "jb2a.sleep.cloud.02.pink",  
  'slashing': patreon ? "jb2a.claws.400px.bright_orange" : "jb2a.claws.400px.red",  
  'sonic': "jb2a.soundwave.02.blue",  
  'spirit': patreon ? "jb2a.spirit_guardians.blue.no_ring" : "jb2a.spirit_guardians.blueyellow.ring",  
  'vitality': "jb2a.divine_smite.caster.reversed.blueyellow",  
  'void': patreon ? "jb2a.divine_smite.caster.reversed.dark_purple" : "jb2a.divine_smite.caster.reversed.blueyellow",
}
console.log({f: files[type]})
return [{type: "text", value: files[type]}];
